title: Happiest Health launches Digital Healthcare business, appoints Ravi Joshi as President & CEO
summary: New business unit to introduce virtual doctor appointments and develop AI-based healthcare platforms
contentHtml:
New business unit to introduce virtual doctor appointments and develop AI-based healthcare platforms

Happiest Health has announced the launch of its fifth business unit, Digital Healthcare, and the appointment of Ravi Joshi as President & CEO – Digital Healthcare.

According to the company, the launch marks the expansion of its integrated healthcare ecosystem through technology-enabled services designed to reach Atithis across India and internationally.

Ravi Joshi, who previously served as Co-CEO of the Knowledge business, will lead the new business vertical. According to the company, he will oversee the development of the Digital Healthcare business unit, with its first offering being virtual doctor appointments that will enable Atithis to connect with qualified healthcare professionals remotely. The company stated that the Digital Healthcare business aims to build a platform connecting Atithis and healthcare experts beyond geographical boundaries.

Happiest Health also stated that it is developing an AI-powered healthcare platform to support patient engagement, health decision-making and personalised healthcare experiences. According to the company, products including Cardio Expert, Paediatric Expert and the Lifestyle Intelligence Platform are in advanced stages of development, with additional digital offerings planned during the year.

Announcing the launch and appointment, Ashok Soota, Chairman & Chief Strategy Officer, Happiest Health, said, “Digital Healthcare represents a significant opportunity for us, and I am delighted that we have been able to identify strong leadership from within the organization. Ravi has consistently demonstrated the ability to innovate, build and execute, and I am confident he will establish a strong foundation for this business. The appointment reinforces our belief in nurturing internal talent, and positions Happiest Health to accelerate innovation and create long-term value as we advance towards our long-term vision and IPO journey.”

Commenting on his appointment, Ravi Joshi, President & CEO – Digital Healthcare, said, “Digital healthcare presents an exciting opportunity to be the health partner every Atithi can trust, at every moment of their life. And transcend their relationship with health from being episodic and reactive to continuous and lifelong care partnerships. I look forward to building this new business, beginning with our Doctor’s Program, and creating innovative digital healthcare solutions that complement Happiest Health’s broader vision of preventive and integrated healthcare.”
